The institute has specializations in Fire & Safety Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Nanotechnology.

placements.overview:
MBIZ NAFS Management Fire & Safety Engineering College is a private institute. It is located in Kolkata, West Bengal. MBIZ NAFS Management Fire & Safety Engineering College provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 17 courses across specialisations such as Fire & Safety Engineering , Industrial Engineering and Nanotechnology. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., After 10th Diploma, PG Diploma and UG Diploma. MBIZ NAFS Management Fire & Safety Engineering College offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Science. MBIZ NAFS Management Fire & Safety Engineering College offers all the campus facilities to students.

At the UG and PG levels, MBIZ NAFS Management Fire & Safety Engineering College offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Science. College offers B.Sc. and UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM and PG Diploma.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good education, better teachers and the best campus.

review_content.Placements: Students with relevant skills and interests are placed. 70% of the civil engineering department students have got placed through college placements. 18 l. p. a. is the highest package offered in this course. Freshers as well as the higher position are also available for placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: College is fully Wi-Fi campus. Digital classrooms and has 2 libraries. Every practical subjects have their own lab. Food is average in the mess. Medical facilities are available. Annual sports and game take place and organized with great joy. There are separate hostel for boys and girls. 2 bedded, 3 bedded as well as 4 bedded rooms are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered here was up to 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course were Jaro Education, Technolitics, Justdial, Byju's, Cognixia, Collebra and many more. About 20% of the students got internships in Jaro Education.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is provided along with air-conditioning facilities. The food served is average, but the sports facilities are very good. Medical facilities are also available, and in the canteens, cleanliness is maintained. The library is highly furnished and equipped with books and a friendly environment. In our course, major project training, internship, science lab and MAT lab are provided.

review_summary.college_name: Lakhmi Chand Institute of Technology, Bilaspur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good campus, helpful teacher faculty, management is good, canteen & cafeteria both are good.

content.Placements: In my batch, there are 67 students. Out of these 67 students, only some of the students were selected during the placement drive. I also got selected in one of the placement drives, but I rejected the offer because of some personal issues. However, in this college, there is more chance to get selected if you are a hardworking person. You can easily get selected in the placement process.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, there are fully separate facilities for girls and boys. The boys' hostel is just opposite the girls' hostel to maintain discipline between boys and girls. They provide Wi-Fi, water, theatre, electricity, and all the necessary things to make life easier. The wardens are helpful for the students who live in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Only good if you are not getting any government college or you want to study in Bilaspur.

content.Placements: Almost sixty percentage of interested students got placement, who really prepared for the placement's group discussions, tests, interviews and all. The highest package goes to 5.5 LPA. Most of the companies are from non-tech background. Best for M. B.A. Graduates.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, labs, classrooms, and all departments are well placed. Hostel facility is also good, they provide free wi-fi for the students but canteen's food is really bad. Girls hostel is said to be better than boys hostel. But I've visited boys hostel and it is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good education, better teachers and the best campus.

content.Placements: Students with relevant skills and interests are placed. 70% of the civil engineering department students have got placed through college placements. 18 l. p. a. is the highest package offered in this course. Freshers as well as the higher position are also available for placement.
content.Infrastructure: College is fully Wi-Fi campus. Digital classrooms and has 2 libraries. Every practical subjects have their own lab. Food is average in the mess. Medical facilities are available. Annual sports and game take place and organized with great joy. There are separate hostel for boys and girls. 2 bedded, 3 bedded as well as 4 bedded rooms are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered here was up to 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course were Jaro Education, Technolitics, Justdial, Byju's, Cognixia, Collebra and many more. About 20% of the students got internships in Jaro Education.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is provided along with air-conditioning facilities. The food served is average, but the sports facilities are very good. Medical facilities are also available, and in the canteens, cleanliness is maintained. The library is highly furnished and equipped with books and a friendly environment. In our course, major project training, internship, science lab and MAT lab are provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good for theoretical knowledge but not for practical aspects of it.

content.Placements: 4 LPA was the maximum package offered at my time. ROI is not there. Only CSE students can get placement here because the companies which visit campus are more of the IT sector. Rest all stream students doesn't get placements. No fixed companies are there which visit for placement on regular intervals so can't tell about top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Hostel and College both are quiet good. The campus is well maintained, kept clean and hygienic. Classrooms have CCTV cameras. All the labs have required equipments. The only problem is with the food and quality of food served in the hostel it's pathetic. But there is a Cafeteria in the campus which provides hgoodood food and is well maintained.

All the labs have required equipments. The only problem is with the food and quality of food served in the hostel it's pathetic. But there is a Cafeteria in the campus which provides hgoodood food and is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Bilaspur for study.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good in our college. Every lab has all equipment with proper maintenance. The campus is awesome with a huge garden, basketball court, playground and cafeteria.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Chhattisgarh with many top rankers in the year 2015.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is one of the best in a Bilaspur city. For each and every subject or course, there is a separate department and division. There is a total of 2 partially separated building for different streams. Quality of food served in the mess is average as we get in every common college. The college provides bus facility for students. Students can participate in many different co-curricular activities and sports. Every year the college conducts a sports week where any stude...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides education with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities like air-conditioner, Wi-Fi and smart classrooms, medical facilities, and also restrooms, etc., for the master of business administration students. The library is well-established with books of every course. Labs are available for pharmacy engineering and MBA.

reviews.review_heading: Best college, good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure of school, college and hostels. Proper availability of books in library, availability of Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well proper and well cleaned. Madical facility at the right time. There are sports and games activity at the end of every year.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good. Facilities are also good, but all the teachers are not highly qualified.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in our college, and it is a huge campus. Our college has libraries, medical facilities and also provides a separate hostel for both girls and boys. Libraries and computer labs are highly air-conditioned. The meal served in the hostel is healthy, and it is prepared with proper care. There are 3 sports grounds on our campus.

reviews_list.review_title: It's good, if you want to explore and learn & placed in better companies then it's a good platform.

review_content.Placements: 1) 60% got placed. 2) the highest is 5.6, the lowest is 3, the average salary is 3.5 LPA 3) Top companies are tech mahindra, amazon, Genpact 4) top role were software developer, tech support. 60% is enough marks to sit in the placement and give interview. review_content.Infrastructure: 1) Wi-Fi, computer lab, physics lab, chemistry lab, elcs lab, libraries, classroom, are available to read and explore. 2) it's good, food is nice including veg and non-veg both, medical facilities are available, basketball, cricket, badminton ground are available.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, I had a good experience.

review_content.Placements: The placements cell of the college is pretty good with their work. There is a nice blend of the A-rated companies to new startups which are on board for campus recruitment every year. Even there are mega placement drives as well which are organised by the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is pretty big. Grounds for sports like football and cricket are very well maintained. Even basketball and badminton court are managed well. Labs and classrooms are clean. However, they can be renovated and improved for an even better experience.

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely dissastified with this college.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements. I will never recommend this college to anyone who has bigger dreams in life.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel. Rented homes are provided. The infrastructure of the college is not good. There is no canteen. There are no medical facilities. The college is situated far away from the main road. No transportation facilities are provided by the college.
review_content.Faculty: Exams are conducted to improve ourselves. Most teachers have master's degrees. Most of the seniors failed their semester exams. I am a student with a non-commerce background. It is not difficult to study, but the results are not good. They make fake promises to students. Male staff members are not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Masters of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a life-changing college.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students from our batch were placed. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA. Students are working with Byjus, Accenture, Sami Sabinsa Group, etc. The faculty members will conduct many soft skills development training and industrial visits, as well as mock interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is a blessing to the students. Our college provides very spacious classrooms. The college is situated on 50 acres of land, a very green and calm place. It is good in the summer season. The main attraction of the campus is the building structure.

paragraphs: Delhi Global Institute of Managementadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers various courses such as BCA, BA LLB, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute offers AI-based courses. The selection criteria are merit-based. To get admitted to DGIM, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process atDelhi Global Institute of Managementis conducted online. The institute also offers a scholarship to ST/SC students. Read the article to know more aboutDelhi Global Institute of Managementcourse admission2025.

Delhi Global Institute of Management admission is openfor various programmes. The institute provides over 10 courses across multiple specialisations, such as Computer Application, Law, Management, etc. The programme's mode of study is full-time. Delhi Global Institute of Management admissionsare completely merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Delhi Global Institute of Management is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Delhi Global Institute of Management Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. Aspirants need to apply at the university's official website, https://www.dgimfaridabad.com/admission, to be admitted to various programmes. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute admits students based on merit. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. For UG courses, students must pass Class 12, and for PG courses, candidates must pass graduation. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theDelhi Global Institute of Management feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Fully satisfied because of faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Around 75% of students from our college secure placements. The starting salary packages range from a minimum of Rs. 8,000 to a maximum of Rs. 25,000. Students also secure internship opportunities in companies like Sun Pharma and Novo Nordisk. Some students pursue higher studies such as M.Pharm, while others start their own businesses as pharmacists.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provide us many facilities like Wi-Fi, a computer lab, and a library. There are separate rooms such as girls' room and a boys' common room. In every room air conditioning is installed. College has a good ventilation system.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: There are good facilities available.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good at this college. Almost 70% of students are selected for placement and they are placed. The highest package at this college is 5 lacs per year. The college placement cell is so good and students get into reputed companies or industries.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good and the warden is a good teacher. In the hostel, every facility is available and all types of sports are available. The food quality is poor. But the menu is the best and the hostel has so many good rooms and facilities.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Industrial Microbiology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It was value for money, a nice college life.

content.Placements: We all opted for higher studies after our graduation. About 32 companies visited the college for placements. Some of my batchmates got selected in banks and MNCs, but I didn't know the exact percentage of selected students. There was also a separate placement cell in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The girls' hostel was very bad, with poor sunlight and a very suffocated. The infrastructure was very poor. The warden was very rude and never took complaints seriously. The mess was not good, the mess in charge was very uncivil, and the food was very oily and spicy. There were very few washrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: About 95% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is about 12-15 LPA exactly not known. Top companies are Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc. About 90% of students got internships in many pharmacy companies and hospitals in Himachal, Punjab, Haryana, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Welcome our college is well developed and the infrastructure is very good. Classrooms, libraries, and labs are well-developed and good. There are good Wi-Fi connections. The hostel food is good and they provide medical facilities also. There is a snooker pool, table tennis, and volleyball in the hostel and also on college campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied because of faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 75% of students from our college secure placements. The starting salary packages range from a minimum of Rs. 8,000 to a maximum of Rs. 25,000. Students also secure internship opportunities in companies like Sun Pharma and Novo Nordisk. Some students pursue higher studies such as M.Pharm, while others start their own businesses as pharmacists.
content.Infrastructure: College provide us many facilities like Wi-Fi, a computer lab, and a library. There are separate rooms such as girls' room and a boys' common room. In every room air conditioning is installed. College has a good ventilation system.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: There are good facilities available.

content.Placements: Placements are good at this college. Almost 70% of students are selected for placement and they are placed. The highest package at this college is 5 lacs per year. The college placement cell is so good and students get into reputed companies or industries.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good and the warden is a good teacher. In the hostel, every facility is available and all types of sports are available. The food quality is poor. But the menu is the best and the hostel has so many good rooms and facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: May be satisfied. But not fully .

content.Placements: Maximum students look for further studies after B.Pharma. And those who are interested in jobs college have collaboration with many companies. And as a fresher you can get a job of 18500 per month in these companies the amount may vary as per the ability of the candidate.
content.Infrastructure: In 2020 the facilities where not that much good as compared to now. They renovated the infrastructure and added more facilities like increase in number of books in library and good canteen food. Sports facilities. Now a days college has been indulge in promoting students talent as well.

admission_process.title: Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutionsoffers courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels. Some of the courses include B.P.Ed, B.Ed, M.Sc. and PG Diploma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 41,140 - 2,88,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

reviews.review_text: Proper classes with best-experienced teaching staff mastered in their streams, giving great guidance towards the courses, are available. The library staff was too cooperative regarding the books, and anyone can go there and read books they want, and you can also issue the books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Guru Nanak Khalsa College, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 19 May 2023)
reviews.review_heading: I give the college a 7.5/10.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi provided by our college; they give us a library for studying; they provide food through the canteen; there is no mess in our college; but the internal structure of our college is good. There is no Wi-Fi, no AC, and no smart boards. It looks like a government college with third class facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Guru Nanak Khalsa College, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 1 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good and has a friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: The library is good. Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. The library is air-conditioned and has all the required books. There are separate sections for girls and boys. An online library is also available with about 4-5 librarians to help us.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Guru Nanak Khalsa College, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 30 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: This college is affiliated with KUK University, but the placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The college building and infrastructure are good. All the classrooms are good, neat and clean. Wi-Fi is available only for faculty. The library is huge and has all the books. Hostel is available only for girls. The canteen is very good. The food quality is good. Medical and sports facilities are also very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Guru Nanak Khalsa College, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 29 Aug 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Best college for BCA, you can consider it.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is also quite good. They offer both AC and non-AC rooms, as well as large rooms with 24 hour electricity. We have a good environment and security guards on duty 24 hours a day.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Guru Nanak Khalsa College, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 6 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: The college is absolute value for money and it has supportive faculty members and staff.
reviews.review_text: Above average infrastructure is available but the surroundings are neat and clean. Greenery is all around to give relaxation to our eyes and hearts. Canteen provides good food, obviously not like that of home but still good in quality. No harmful eateries can be found in or around the college campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Guru Nanak Khalsa College, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 18 Sep 2021)
reviews.review_heading: The college is not that good for computer science students.
reviews.review_text: The library is good in our college. Classrooms are average, but facilities are good. The college is good only for games because they are also famous for their game facilities. They never help any student with anything except 1 or 2 teachers. I think labs are not good at all.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Guru Nanak Khalsa College, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 14 Mar 2021)
reviews.review_heading: It is an A+ NAAC approved college, with good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are good classrooms with Wi-Fi facility, good computer labs and a proper cafeteria. There is a well-furnished library, where books are offered to students at no cost, and that helps the students a lot. There was a proper hostel facility with average quality food. Proper security is available at the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Guru Nanak Khalsa College, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 8 Dec 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, teaching staff members are a positive thing about this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the whole college is a bit low level. It doesn't seem like you are studying at a particular college, but I like the thing about the facilities given by this college is the computer department. This department has a better infrastructure than any department has.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Guru Nanak Khalsa College, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 13 Aug 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Visit the college and see how students and teacher are corporate with each other.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are properly maintained. Labs are clean and the thing which the students needs are available here. The library has all books for all course of many other writers. Quality of the food served in the canteen is very tasty. The hostel facility is not properly maintained.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts and Science offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Whereas, at PG level, Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts and Science offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and M.Com. Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts and Science fee structure for all the courses is around INR 9,000 to 2,20,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts and Science is a good institution for M.Phil, PG Diploma, M.Com, M.Sc, MBA/PGDM, B.Com, B.Sc, BBA, BCA courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts and Science are Computer Science, International Business, Mathematics.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Management - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am almost satisfied with our college facilities, staff members and environment.

review_content.Placements: About 90% of students get placed every year from here. The salary offered here ranges from Rs. 15,000-20,000 per month. TCS and Infosys are the top recruiters here. About 90% of students got internships in Flipkart. Companies such as Axis Bank and private insurance companies recruit students from here every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not very good here. The food served here is the worst, and Wi-Fi is available. Sports facilities are available, but there is an irresponsible gym facility. The college building is weak, and the mess is sometimes unhygienic. Playgrounds are available, and there is a good environmental area. There is no network signal at all, and you may use mobile phones in some network signal spots.

reviews_list.review_title: You can opt for the college without thinking.

review_content.Placements: The placements of the senior batches were very much satisfying. The companies that came to hire were big MNCs namely Tata, Wipro, etc. The recruiters were friendly and charitable. They even helped some students to get through the interview round as much as they could.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was incredible and very much well indeed. The college was neat and clean. The teachers were very helpful and punctual. The students including me were very dedicated to our day to day activities. Playgrounds were large, and the accommodation facilities were top notch.

individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2019 were provided. But after lockdown not that much placements were .

content.Placements: In our College there is a appromixate salery of 15k-25k. Accounts assistant is the top role offered in this course.

According to the rankings from Outlook-ICARE, Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts and Science outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts and Science's rankings in 'BBA' category have shown stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts and Science's rank is #102, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Commerce' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts and Science's rank is #114, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2019 were provided. But after lockdown not that much placements were .
reviews.review_text: Our campus has a good computer lab and the hostel facilities are also liked by us. Our College hostel food is prepared hygienic manner. The medical facilities are also good in our College. They take some more care to sports and our College always supports us in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied for exploring our talents on day to day basis with teachers most are in a friendly manner.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, library, labs, weekly seminars, prior permission to attend seminars on other colleges are the facilities and infrastructure available for this course. Mess and canteen are kept in a neat manner, medical facilities are available immediately if needed with above average quality. Best play grounds are allocated for sports and games with good play items.

reviews.review_heading: I am almost satisfied with our college facilities, staff members and environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very good here. The food served here is the worst, and Wi-Fi is available. Sports facilities are available, but there is an irresponsible gym facility. The college building is weak, and the mess is sometimes unhygienic. Playgrounds are available, and there is a good environmental area. There is no network signal at all, and you may use mobile phones in some network signal spots.

reviews.review_heading: You can opt for the college without thinking.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was incredible and very much well indeed. The college was neat and clean. The teachers were very helpful and punctual. The students including me were very dedicated to our day to day activities. Playgrounds were large, and the accommodation facilities were top notch.

reviews.review_heading: College is Absolutely Satisfying. Got 100 % placement in our college this year.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is enabled on all floors and the Hostel is quite good, fully natural Infrastructure. Located in a Remote place. The hostel is also enabled with Wi-Fi. Good food. All sorts of games are played inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Honest Review of Kovai Kalaimagal College of Arts & Science.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice honestly. The college located in the banks of Western ghats. There is no Wi-Fi facility in this college. The canteen food are the worst. No gaming kits in this college. Medical facility is very good. Classrooms are not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: The college has average placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice as the surroundings are full of trees and hills. Labs are average and classrooms are not air-conditioned but the weather there is always good so no worries about classrooms getting too hot. In the hostel per room contains 4 students and the mess food is average.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for JRE Group of Institutions (JRE) admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the JRE Group of Institutions (JRE):

fees_and_eligibility.overview: JRE Group of Institutions (JRE) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, JRE Group of Institutions (JRE) offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. JRE Group of Institutions (JRE) fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,44,800 to 6,90,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by JRE Group of Institutions (JRE) is up to 360. Good thing to know is that JRE Group of Institutions (JRE) has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Perfect place for building your career in the industry.

content.Placements: The college had a wonderful placement team. My entire batch got placed in top reputed MNCs like HCL, Wipro, etc. I was also a part of the core placement team and took care of all the soft call to HR of various companies to fix the meeting for both on-campus and off-campus placement .
content.Infrastructure: They had a very unique and good infrastructure in the entire Delhi NCR region.
content.Faculty: Teachers were well qualified and experienced to train and teach students. The course curriculum was relevant and based on the industry needs. Since the college had collaboration with Educomp and Raffles, it had industry trained professors and advanced technology to train students. Workshops and time to time training sessions were also conducted.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied by infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: Nearly 60% of the student were placed by college placements and mainly from CS and IT fields. The packages were 2.75 - 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Hcl, Blackrock, Xalta. Talking about the internship from cold there were 70% of students who got internship from cold and rest have to find by there own means.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was very good and even one of the best infrastructure in G. Noida. The classrooms were ventilated and was air-conditioned too. There was a fountain in the center of the building and an amphitheater too. There were a huge playground and dedicated basketball court.

individual_reviews.title: Poor crowd and good faculty.

content.Placements: The college is about to close. There is no placement cell. Our batch is the last and we are not expecting anything from my college related to placement. There is a dispute going on which is why our placement is not good.
content.Infrastructure: In Greater Noida, it is the best college in terms of infrastructure. The hostel is like a hotel. The classrooms are awesome. They have AC. Digital library. The toilets are western and very neat and clean. The crowd of the college is bad.

reviews.review_heading: JRE Group of Institutions- I completed my PGDM from here.
reviews.review_text: This college excels in infrastructure, not just cosmetically efficient but it provides very good facilities as well. The seminar hall is phenomenal. There are excellent classrooms equipped with a projector and a computer and are fully air-conditioned. GD/PI rooms are also present where we often give mock interviews.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing Infrastructure and class environment.
reviews.review_text: Ravishing infrastructure I must tell. A/C classrooms, labs, fountain, playground, amazing library, lift facilities, etc. are provided. Very good food for boarders. Comfortable hostel rooms. Wi-Fi facility is also available. Doctors are always present in the hostel. No infrastructure related problems. Power backup is available 24hrs.

reviews.review_heading: The truth of JRE School of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was its greatest asset. Everything from classrooms to hostel rooms was great. All our classrooms were air-conditioned and had great furniture and ample space. The library is one of the best I have seen in any college. Labs were equipped and we had single rooms for the hostel. Tthe mess is good too, and apart from all this, we had a tennis court, a basketball court, cricket and football grounds too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JRE Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the only factor that sets this college apart from others in NCR region. Classrooms and library are spacious along with AC facility. The library has all the books related to our courses and it also maintains a digital library to access books from anywhere at anytime. Labs have all the instruments. The campus has a basketball court, a badminton court, a lawn tennis court and a football court. But the warden doesn't give the related sports equipment unless and until we approac...

reviews.review_heading: Review of JRE Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and there is so much of greenery in our college. There are a variety of flowers and there are fountains also. Our classrooms are also well-structured. Earlier there was a student activity area but now it is not used because there are no fun activities for students. Earlier, a Wi-Fi connection was very good but now students face problems there also. Student play basketball, football, badminton and cricket. The material is also available with the warden but they don't provid...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Our college has got a very nice infrastructure.
All the classrooms are fully air-conditioned. 
We've got Philip Kotler's library. There are numerous sports facilities available on the campus like basketball, football, volleyball, cricket, lawn tennis, table tennis, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Nice place to be at. Memories will always be there. I will miss my college.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is really good.
It is a newly made college, only 4 years old.
It is properly cleaned.
It has a nice cricket ground, basketball field, badminton courts, table tennis, fully equipped computer labs (4 computer labs) , tennis ground, football field.

reviews.review_heading: It is not an excellent college. It is a UPTU college. More courses are yet to come in this college.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is very good. All facilities are available from WiFi to good classrooms. Library and grounds are also very good. 
The infrastructure is the main attraction of the college. Hostel facilities are also very good. 
One can surely be fully satisfied with the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Below average, not worthy of the heavy fee.
reviews.review_text:
College elevators are shut down since a year.

Classrooms: Working ACs, plastic chairs, whiteboards, projectors (faculty and students don't make use of it generally).

Library: Well stocked with latest magazines, journals, textbooks.

Medical facilities: None.

Labs: Standard PCs.

Canteen: Serves maggi, parathas, milkshakes only, few counted FMGC items also present.

Hostel rooms: Boys and girls hostel are in the same building! Decent space, study table, side table and a decent cupboard. 3 room...

reviews.review_heading: Amazing infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure is good. There is WiFi connectivity for laptops, a good library with textbooks along with novels and journals and online access. Well stocked library - separate Harvard Business Corner. There is a football ground, a basketball court, a lawn tennis court, badminton court and gymnasium for sports and fitness. Classrooms are big and airy with air conditioners. There is elevator facility as well. The food quality at canteen is better than most of the colleges in the neighborhood. ...

review_content.Placements: Around 40% student get placement from this institution every year. The highest package from this course would be 2.5Lakhs and the lowest package would be 1.5Lakh. The companies like Infosys and Wipro take recruitment from this institution. Software Developer, Bug fixer, Analysis are the roles offered by the companies.

reviews_list.review_title: The difference between other colleges and ours is the teachers as they are the best.

review_content.Placements: Placements are done at the last of the 3rd year. So it was not provided for me. The college says that huge companies visit our college for placements, and I think it is right because I have talked to the seniors and they also told me the same. It is very hard to get selected.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities that are required for students like a huge library, study hall and boys and girls common room. It also has a hospital right beside it. Our college provides 3 buses for students to get transportation to their home to college. The campus is small.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is only for studies, not for extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: 45 percent of students got placed from ECE department. The highest package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA in ECE for IT Sector. Canteen does not serve quality food and food is also unhygienic. No medical facilities are available in this college.

reviews_list.review_title: Nice college infrastructure. I recommend it for educational life.

review_content.Placements: Top MNCs like Zoho are conducting off-campus incubation drives in AMCET. 50% of students got their placements via college placements. They conduct proper training sessions and mock interviews for candidates and help to overcome their fear of interview as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and environment; playground available for all games like cricket, football, and volleyball. They encourage students for zonal and state-level matches for those are more likely to be sportspersons. Otherwise, they are so glad to provide more opportunities.

content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and environment; playground available for all games like cricket, football, and volleyball. They encourage students for zonal and state-level matches for those are more likely to be sportspersons. Otherwise, they are so glad to provide more opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 85% of students get placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, the lowest salary package is 3 LPA, and the average salary package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, HCL, and Zoho. Around 65% of students get internships in our course at Letsgrowmore and Oasis Infobyte. The roles offered are front-end development, back-end developer, web development, tester, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of our college are good. Wi-Fi and computers are good. Since I am a day scholar, I don't know about the hostel. Food served in the canteen is good to eat.

hostel.description: Separate hostel for boys and girls. Nutritious food is served to the students in a centrally located mess, good security and surveillance systems and have all the required amenities like canteen, water purifiers, laundry, house keeping service, common rooms, recreation rooms.

library.description: Fully functional library information center includes digital library to access both national and international journals.the library building is fully air-conditioned and it is open to both students and faculty on all working days.

reviews.review_heading: A Life changing experience with great infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very good, and the food provided in the hostel is top notch, everything is fine. Lawns are awesome. Classrooms are neat and clean. Canteen is a heavenly place where I spend most of my time. In the library, there are a lot of books. This helped me improve my knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Above average because of teaching , better placements, and average infrastructure
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities are good but not best or better. It has AC with good circulation, and laptops are good quality. One computer is damaged yet they have not changed but it's working. All the systems are not in 12th gen systems which don't satisfy some of the students.

reviews.review_heading: This college is only for studies, not for extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is always neat and clean. Campus is always calm and chill. Many sorts activities are conducted here. Classrooms are good but benches and tables are damaged. Canteen does not serve quality food and food is also unhygienic. No medical facilities are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college infrastructure. I recommend it for educational life.
reviews.review_text:
Good infrastructure and environment; playground available for all games like cricket, football, and volleyball. They encourage students for zonal and state-level matches for those are more likely to be sportspersons.
Otherwise, they are so glad to provide more opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our college are good. Wi-Fi and computers are good. Since I am a day scholar, I don't know about the hostel. Food served in the canteen is good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the placements provided in our college.
reviews.review_text: It has a green campus surrounded by trees. More than 4 labs are provided to CSE students, along with free Wi-Fi. It has a central library with a good amount of books. Mess available in our college serves average quality food. There are two canteens within the campus. Every year, sports day and cultural programs are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with overall criteria of college and hostel.
reviews.review_text: Available Mechanical workshops, and Wi-Fi routers in sections of classes. Proper Food facilities are available, like chapati in the afternoon's meals is unlimited and at night times weekly twice, the non-edge will be provided Tea and milk for hostel students in the morning and evening times.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, good faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Computer Science engineering consists of many facilities in our college. It has good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available, and labs are good. It has a medium library. The hostel in our college is good, neat, and clean. Food is available in the mess and canteen alternatively. It is good for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Then campus are natural  atmosphere in amcet college
reviews.review_text:
Lab practical is easy. Classrooms is very nice, library is particularly books are available. Hostel ,sports ,canteen 50% good
The hostel are boys and girls supparatly assigned. Canteen is very small. Sports for zonal matches and cm throphy game participants for students

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with our college faculty members as well as placements.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are several labs but as per our course there is one lab and seminar hall to conduct seminars as well as PPTs. There is also a library with a silent environment. Our library consists of different types of newspapers, knowledge books, placement books, novels, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with infrastructure and environment but good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and environment of the college are not good. The furniture is old, but in good condition. The college is located near a hospital, which makes it a less than optimal environment for students to learn. There are no extracurricular activities other than studies.

reviews.review_heading: The college was too good, and the environment is simply superb.
reviews.review_text: The teachers are too good and so friendly to us ...They teaching is too good, and classrooms and labs are spacious and extraordinary. Everything is perfect. Studying is also good. We can develop skills, and they teach lab activities too well.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's the best degree college in Vizianagaram.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at our college are pretty good and include a well-stocked library, along with washrooms, labs, and drinking water. Wi-Fi facilities are available only in computer labs. Currently, the residential facilities are limited, and the quality of food at the canteen is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best degree college.
reviews.review_text: Among other degree colleges, our college has good infrastructure, including a library and clean classrooms. The labs are also well-equipped. Currently, residential facilities are limited and mostly available for female students only. The college canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: This course includes low salary packages as well as CRT training for government jobs.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs are not good. There is no air conditioning in the computer labs. The physics lab is good. Hostel facility is not available. Students need to stay in other rooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is better to go to this college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are not up to the mark. Many computers are not in good condition. The Internet is available for computers, which are in good condition. Wi-Fi is not available for your personal use. Lab assistants are not friendly with students. Hostel facilities are not available at this college. Private hostels are available outside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Aditya where the enhancing the mind of students.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure like canteen and laboratories. In our college there is a good computer Science lab, which contains nearly 200 computers. In our there is big semenar hall. And we have the digital library along with library which contains nearly 3000 books.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good performing placement hub.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. In our college, there is a good digital library and a library which contains nearly 5,000 books. We also have computer laboratories and physics and chemistry laboratories with good lab assistants in every lab.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good studies.
reviews.review_text: The college consists of good infrastructure, and the quality of classrooms is good. The library consists of a lot of books related to our courses, and other books we have to learn to get motivated. The Vizianagaram branch does not have a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: is one of the best colleges in Andhra Pradesh with the highest placement record.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is so innovative and upgraded facilities. With all Wi-Fi labs and classrooms and library will all coverage books
And we get medical facilities in emergency, hygiene drinking water and cleaned sanitation and the offers sports for our wellbeing.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2021 and good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good when compared to other colleges in our area. The labs are well-equipped with top class material. We have a library not so big. The classrooms are also good. They are equipped with all the facilities. The Wi-Fi service is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2021,really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Every room is well equipped with sufficient seats, ventilation and fans. We have a library which is not so big. The labs are top class. They are well equipped with all the necessary items. The wifi service is also good. We do not have a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: In our college there is a good infrastructure facilities
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms where so good and in our college Have library that contains more than 5000 books  and our college provided many cultural activities programs and awareness programs also and we have many games and do science days maths days etc……the needs much

reviews.review_heading: It's good for placements but not sure about the studies here.
reviews.review_text: They are 3 computer labs in our college and one library is there. These facilities and infrastructure are available in our college/department. The hostel is good but the food is not good, and the rooms are not good, so better to avoid the hostel and take a room or stay at a relative's house is better to study.

highlights.summary: Jinvani Management College is an institute located in Arrah, Bihar. Jinvani Management College courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Jinvani Management College offers a total of 7 courses in streams such as Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are MBA/PGDM, BCA and BBA and the total seat intake for the available courses is 360. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Finance, Human Resources and Retail. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 2,47,000 to 3,15,000. Apart from this, the Jinvani Management College campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Interior, Spatial and Product Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good teachers, placements, and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: I have seen every senior getting placed. I can say that 100% of the interior design students got internships. Poorvankara, Vaishnavi, and Salarpuria Sattva are the major recruiting companies for our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't have a so-called campus vibe. It is a building situated in Koramangala. We get access to Wi-Fi for academic purposes. We have a decent classroom to occupy a maximum of 20 students. There is a hall on the top floor where combined classes and events take place. Labs and a library are also available. There is no hostel facility provided by the college, but the college coordinators help students find the best PGs nearby. We have an integration day happening every year where we have football and cricket competitions between different batches. Mess and canteen services are available. They are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Graphics and Communications Design - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has great courses and great faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There is 100% placement at the college. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA-3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are 3M, Funskool, Uber, and Wipro. There are companies that require graphic designers, illustrators, and web designers.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has big classrooms. Each classroom can accommodate around 20 students. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. There is a library with design books you can refer to. The college also provides Mac labs. There is a projector in every classroom. The quality of food available at the canteen is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphics and Communications Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: COLLEGE REVIEW (lisaa school design).

content.Placements: Our batch is in the 2nd year so placements are not application us. But I heard from seniors that Placement percentage is high, around 85%. There are many good opportunities provided. Students are easily able to transition from college to workplace.
content.Infrastructure: The college has decent infrastructure, there is a canteen that provides food. Some Classrooms provide required facilities like laptops. There is no library which could be a sphere of improvement. Facilities for foundation year is provided like art supplies etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Interior, Spatial and Product Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good teachers, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: I have seen every senior getting placed. I can say that 100% of the interior design students got internships. Poorvankara, Vaishnavi, and Salarpuria Sattva are the major recruiting companies for our course.
content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't have a so-called campus vibe. It is a building situated in Koramangala. We get access to Wi-Fi for academic purposes. We have a decent classroom to occupy a maximum of 20 students. There is a hall on the top floor where combined classes and events take place. Labs and a library are also available. There is no hostel facility provided by the college, but the college coordinators help students find the best PGs nearby. We have an integration day happening every year where we have football and cricket competitions between different batches. Mess and canteen services are available. They are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphics and Communications Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has great courses and great faculty members.

content.Placements: There is 100% placement at the college. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA-3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are 3M, Funskool, Uber, and Wipro. There are companies that require graphic designers, illustrators, and web designers.
content.Infrastructure: It has big classrooms. Each classroom can accommodate around 20 students. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. There is a library with design books you can refer to. The college also provides Mac labs. There is a projector in every classroom. The quality of food available at the canteen is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphics and Communications Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of LISAA School of Design, Bangalore.

content.Placements: I am currently in my third year. Placements start by the end of the third year. I have not attended placement programs yet. A few top companies like 3M, Wipro, Tommy Hilfiger, and others came for recruitment in the previous year. All of our seniors got placed at these companies.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is sophisticated, with colourfully painted walls. The canteen serves delicious and homey food. Classrooms have air conditioning and other necessary amenities. There are two computer labs and a reading room. The college is well maintained.

admission_overview.college_name: LISAA School of Design Admission 2026 (Open): Application, Dates, Fee & Eligibility

admission_overview.title: LISAA School of Design Bangalore Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: LISAA School of Design is one of the best design schools in Bangalore. Managed by CREO Valley, and CREO Valley is affiliated with Bangalore City University, LISAA School of Design stands as the top choice among Fashion Designing Colleges in Bangalore and Interior Designing Colleges in Bangalore. Offering a range of degree and diploma courses in a number of design principles, LISAA School of Design is perfect for students who have a keen interest in design and creativity. The institute offers a number of courses at UG, PG, Diploma levels etc. LISAA School of Design admissions are entrance based with the institute accepting scores of LISAA CAT scores for the same. Under the UG category students can enroll in their desired courses such as Interior & Product Design, Fashion & Textile Design, Graphics, UI/UX, Illustrations and Web Design, BSc in Film Making, and much more. Under the diploma category, courses under the specialisation of Interior Design and Business Management (MBA), Fashion Design and Business Management (MBA), and Diploma in Fashion Design, Interior Design, and Graphic Design are offered.

eligibility_selection.title: LISAA School of Design Bangalore Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: LISAA School of Design admission process is entrance based for all courses. Ensure that the minimum eligibility is met for the preferred course before applying for admission to the same. The eligibility criteria for LISAA School of Design Bangalore differ based on level course. Moreover, the institute conducts its own entrance exam for admissions. Check below to know course wise eligibility & selection criteria: Courses

faqs.answer: LISAA School of Design, Bangalore conducts its own entrance examination, LISAA CAT for admission ito offered courses. Both online and offline attempts of the test are available with the institute. Go to the official LISAA School of Design website and submit an enquiry form. Admission Counseloors from the amdission team of the institute will get in touch to guide further for the entrance test.
faqs.question: What are the entrance examinations accepted by LISAA School of Design, Bangalore for admission into offered courses?

faqs.answer: The basic eligibility requirement for admission into MBA at LISAA School of Design, Bangalore is passing UG in any stream with atleast 50% aggregate from a recognised university. The selection criteria is entrance based with the institute accepting scores of only LISAA CAT for the same.
faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility for admission into MBA programme offered at LISAA School of Design, Bangalore?

faqs.answer: LISAA SoD BSc course admission is through an aptitude test followed by interview round. Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent exam can apply for the UG course. The applications are accepted in online mode and the form can be made available at the centre as well. Moreover, the step-by-step process of LISAA School of Design BSc admissions is as follows:Registration and online application form filling for LISAA CAT examTaking the exam within the six hours of the link sharingWithin 24 hourse the result is sent over mailPay the admission fee to reserve the seat
faqs.question: What is the LISAA School of Design admission process for BSc?

faqs.answer: The school require students to submit certain documents for verification purposes. It helps in verifying whether applicant is eligible for the BDes course or not. The documents required for LISAA School of Design BDes admission are:Marksheet of Class 10 & 12, issued by a recognised boardCopies of a valid Passport & Student Visa (for International Students)Conduct/ Character certificate & Transfer certificate Medically Fit certificateTen passport & Ten stamp size photos
faqs.question: Which documents are required for BDes at LISAA School of Design, Bangalore?

admission_process.title: LISAA School of Design Bangalore Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: LISAA School of Designhas an entrance based admission pocess. The process starts with the application process, conducted in the online mode. The college conducts its own entrance examination,LISAA CATfor admission into the offered courses. Students must appear for the exam first and then apply for the preferred programme at LISAA School of Design. Find below a step-wise explanation of LISAA School of Design admission process:
lists: LISAA CAT: Go to the official website and fill the enquiry form, after which adfmission counsellor from the admission team will get in touch to help in guiding for the entrance test.
Application: After appearing for the exam and recieving the results, go to the official website and login to fill the application form.
Application Review: The college will review the applications of all candidates after the application deadline and make a merit list of selected candidates on the basis of their entrance scores.
Document Verification: Selected students will be called for an offline document verification.
Admission Confirmation:Those selected, must pay the admission fee in order to confirm the allotted seat. Failure to do so, will lead to automatic cancellation of the candidature.

courses_data.name: LISAA School of Design Bangalore MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: MBA/ PG in course at CREO Valley is offered in association with JNTE. Candidates who have completed graduation can apply for this course. The minimum eligibility is passing UG with atleast 50% aggregate from any stream. The selection for MBA is entrance based with the institute accepting LISAA CAT score.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at LISAA School of Design, Bangalore expensive?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the MBA course at LISAA School of Design is INR 4.60 lakhs.

faqs.question: What is the minimum cutoff for MBA at LISAA School of Design 2023?
faqs.answer: The minimum cutoff for MBA at LISAA School of Design 2023 is estimated to be around 75% for general category students and 65% for reserved category students. Candidates must have a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% marks and a valid score in CAT, GMAT, MAT, or ATMA to be eligible. The selection process consists of shortlisting, group discussion as well as personal interview. LISAA School of Design offers a Master's in Business Administration (MBA) in Interior Design and Business Management

faqs.question: Is LISAA School of Design a good college?
faqs.answer: Yes, LISAA School of Design Bangalore is a good college. LISAA School of Design is a private college and offers a range of Diploma, Undergraduate, and Postgraduate courses in Design, including Fashion Design, Interior Design, Graphic Design, Filmmaking, Product Design, etc. The school is run byCREO Valleyand affiliated withBengaluru City University, recognised byKarnataka Government. LISAA School of Design Postgraduate and Diploma courses are certified byJawaharlal Nehru Technical Education (JNTE) and QAI.

faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to UG courses at LISAA School of Design Bangalore?
faqs.answer: LISAA School of Design Bangalore offers5 Undergraduate coursesin the fields of Interior and Product Design, Fashion & Textile Design,  Graphics, UI/UX, Illustration & Web Design,  Animation, Game & Multimedia Design, and Filmmaking. Admission to the courses is based on entrance exam, followed by a personal interview. Candidates can apply via online application form. Candidates can refer to the points below to know the documents required for admission:Marks cards for Class 10 & 12, issued by the Board or University.Copies of a valid Passport & Student Visa (for International Students)Conduct / Character certificate & Transfer certificate issued by the School / College last studied.Medically Fit Certificate.Ten passport & Ten stamp size photos.

faqs.question: What is LISAA CAT exam at LISAA School of Design Bangalore?
faqs.answer: LISAA Creative Aptitude Test (CAT)is conducted by LISAA School of Design to discover the natural aptitude and interest of aspiring Design students. The test evaluates the skill, power of observation, innovation, design ability, and mental ability, quantitative ability (class 10 maths), analytical ability, communicative english, english comprehension, and general knowledge of the candidate. The exam duration is 2 to 4 hours. Candidates can visit the official website and apply for the exam.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Des at LISAA School of Design, Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Admission to the LISAA School Of Design is subject to an entrance test (called LISAA CAT – Creative Aptitude Test) or through a personal interview. LISAA CAT is conducted to evaluate candidates’ Aptitude, Career Focus & Creativity.Admission to all the courses will be given on the basis of LISAA CAT results, conducted by the college followed by an interview. The duration of the test is about 2-4 hours. Selected candidates will be called for an Interview. A portfolio review is optional.

reviews.review_heading: A general review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The college campus in general has a main building that has all the classrooms, a small canteen, a medium-sized canteen area behind the building, a small bamboo grove, basement parking, and two computer labs equipped with Mac and Windows systems. The college provides speedy Wi-Fi as well.

reviews.review_heading: COLLEGE REVIEW (lisaa school design).
reviews.review_text: The college has decent infrastructure, there is a canteen that provides food. Some Classrooms provide required facilities like laptops. There is no library which could be a sphere of improvement. Facilities for foundation year is provided like art supplies etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't have a so-called campus vibe. It is a building situated in Koramangala. We get access to Wi-Fi for academic purposes. We have a decent classroom to occupy a maximum of 20 students. There is a hall on the top floor where combined classes and events take place. Labs and a library are also available. There is no hostel facility provided by the college, but the college coordinators help students find the best PGs nearby. We have an integration day happening every year where we ha...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has great courses and great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It has big classrooms. Each classroom can accommodate around 20 students. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. There is a library with design books you can refer to. The college also provides Mac labs. There is a projector in every classroom. The quality of food available at the canteen is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LISAA School of Design, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The campus is sophisticated, with colourfully painted walls. The canteen serves delicious and homey food. Classrooms have air conditioning and other necessary amenities. There are two computer labs and a reading room. The college is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Experience at Lisaa school of design, Bangalore was good.
reviews.review_text: I would suggest you have your own laptops without completely relying on the labs in college. Being an outsider you will find some difficulty to find a stay nearby since there is no hostel on the campus. Nevertheless the management will help you out by suggesting a good PG within walking distance.

reviews.review_heading: Lisaa is a good place to discover your designing skills and be industry ready.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure, with mac lab, PC lab, sewing lab, library, workshops and plenty of classrooms. There are good classrooms for studio classes as well. I have not opted for hostel. I have heard that they have good tie-ups. There is a canteen with good food.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms were provided but was not very consistent in terms of quality. It would appreciated if the college provided proper software in the labs and better Wi-Fi connection. Canteen facilities kept changing and was not consistent. Would recommend more sports activities for better productivity in academics.

reviews.review_heading: LISAA is the place to learn and enjoy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with all sorts of facilities such as canteen, Wi-Fi, advanced classrooms and labs. We have a mac lab too for which I feel really lucky to be a part of LISSA. Sadly there is no hostel yet, but we can find flats and PGs nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Lissa School of Design, Bangalore has one of the best infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
We were facilitated with high-speed wi-fi, Mac labs, Classrooms with projectors, cafeteria, Library. The quality of the food was decent enough in the canteen.
We used to go out for outdoor games like football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Its a good college with good name, but then management is a messed up else all is good.
reviews.review_text: 'A' grade infrastructure with Mac labs, studios for photography and shoots, a workshop for product and interior design, labs for fashion design. The canteen provides decent quality food, and it's mostly homemade food. Our college has recently moved to a new address, so the building is little messed up.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LISAA School of Design, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Our campus is fully air-conditioned. Classrooms have adequate benches and comfortable seats. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled and the speed is very fast. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for designing students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. Our campus is situated in a hilly area.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who are interested in the design field around Bangalore city.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not available at the college. There are a lot of PGs for boys and girls available within 1 km of campus, which are budget-friendly. A few of them are tied up with the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LISAA School of Design, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. There are computer labs and good Wi-Fi. We are also provided with projectors in the classrooms. It helps teachers to teach us more conveniently. We don't have a hostel facility. Overall, everything is good.

review_summary.college_name: School of Health Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college and its infrastructure. Many fests are also held here.

content.Placements: Mostly 80-90% of students get placement, and it totally depends on students how they study. The college provides every single student with internships in many hospitals and like by the college. Students get placed in Max, Paras, and Maringo, which is best in Gurgaon with the role of radiographer technician.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided to students. There are sports area and three facilities for education buildings. Classrooms are good, and the library has every type of book. The hostel is good but a little expensive. It provides good food and facilities for sports. The building is also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Qualities of Sushant University.

content.Placements: 5–6 students out of a batch of 37 got placement in Tata Mg Company. Other students also have some interviews to do. Some of them qualified for the interview, while others could not make it. Other than this, they also prepared a board to show the students scores.
content.Infrastructure: Sushant University has three libraries: one is common for all courses, the other is for the architecture department and the last one is for the law department. It also has a big canteen, including various cafeterias where you can enjoy any food you like.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is not the best college for pharmacy.

content.Placements: Not much greater companies are involved in the placements as previously shown that the companies from outside visit here for recruitment. Many top companies visit our college for placements because the owner has been changed.
content.Infrastructure: This college does not have proper classrooms for the B.Pharma students. There are many problems in this college. They also scold us for late entry. Hotels are not good.
content.Faculty: Many faculty members are freshers. They like only to read books in front of students. If we ask doubts, they will answer them tomorrow. They do not know how to solve students' doubts.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is decent for students.

content.Placements: Almost 91% of students got placed in our course. Internships are also offered in this college. After completing this degree, we can opt for basic jobs at psychiatric or psychological clinics with decent salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available. Computer laboratory, library, canteens, basketball court, badminton court, table tennis court, cricket pitches, and basketball court are available in this college. The food served in the canteen is average at affordable prices. Our campus location is very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Optometry (B.Optom) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: SU will give you or I should say you'll have to take whatever you need for a good career.

content.Placements: The placements, especially for a profession like optometry, aren't a problem because of the higher demand of talented practitioners because optometry is still a newer and growing profession. SU has tie-ups with several hospitals like Arunodaya Deseret Eye hospital and Manthan where since this year we go for weekly placements right from our 2nd year. I have also seen my seniors getting placed in these hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure especially for the Health Science building is compromised. But it isn't that bad because all others buildings like hotel management and engineering are well maintained and are open for all students no matter what course. Air-conditioners stop working at times for the health science department. After several applications and reminders, they will send a technician just to satisfy you but the air-conditioners still won't work. The administration is weak.
