reviews.review_heading: It is not the best college for pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: This college does not have proper classrooms for the B.Pharma students. There are many problems in this college. They also scold us for late entry. Hotels are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is decent for students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available. Computer laboratory, library, canteens, basketball court, badminton court, table tennis court, cricket pitches, and basketball court are available in this college. The food served in the canteen is average at affordable prices. Our campus location is very good.

reviews.review_heading: SU will give you or I should say you'll have to take whatever you need for a good career.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure especially for the Health Science building is compromised. But it isn't that bad because all others buildings like hotel management and engineering are well maintained and are open for all students no matter what course. Air-conditioners stop working at times for the health science department. After several applications and reminders, they will send a technician just to satisfy you but the air-conditioners still won't work. The administration is weak.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college. It provided good placements in 2016.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available on the campus are remarkable, and the infrastructure is also good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are available on the campus. Different libraries are available for different courses. The quality of the hostel is very good, and the food is provided weekly as per the schedule. There is a huge canteen for the students. Medical facilities are available. Sports campus is available where students can play games which they want.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is excellent because of its infrastructure, teaching and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is excellent and focusing. All types of facilities are available in our college. Wi-Fi is available in every department. Labs, classrooms and the library are well-maintained. Hostel facilities are also good. Sports clubs and canteen are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent. Classrooms are air-conditioned, and it accommodates about 60 students. They also provide ample books to refer to. Live projectors are available. There is a vast library with numerous publisher books, journals, newspapers, etc. The campus is good in itself.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and nice faculty.
reviews.review_text: Labs and clinic are available. Food is good. Projectors are available. Medical facilities are good. Games and sports are also available at a good level. The college is surrounded by 4-5 canteens. The campus has good greenery and a lavish crowd. A big stage and gym facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: There are no placements provided as there are no requirements for medical course students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is really good. Each school of the university has its own building and setup. The campus is very huge with all good facilities. Labs are in good condition, and all the classrooms are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel and college as well. The library has materials related to all courses.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members. I am not satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of facilities like Wi-Fi. Different labs for each subject. The library is big enough, and classrooms are big enough with projectors, AC, and good lighting. I don't live in a hostel but hostels are good. The hostel price is too high. The canteen is good. Sports are no good except for the academics. The medical facilities are nice.

reviews.review_heading: Highly qualified and supportive teachers.

Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure the minimum aggregate in Class 12 for UG level admissions. Whereas, for PG level admissions, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in graduation. The fee structure of the respective courses includes tuition fees, which may vary from INR 75K to INR 4 Lakh. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college. Don't take a job, give it.

content.Placements: The students of our college passed with a very good percentage and got placed in different and best companies. They provide us with different courses at the college campus. They also provide internships in different companies and in college. They organised different placement opportunities for the growth of the students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs of college are very good. The food in canteen is tasty and healthy. The facilities of that college are also great. The canteen is also very hygienic and clean. The staff of this college is also good in their behaviour. They promote daily activities like yoga and sports for the good health of the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of BIyani Girls College, Jaipur.

content.Placements: 80% of students get placed. The college provides a good placement opportunity. Many well-known companies recruit students from our college. Many paid and unpaid internships are also provided. Overall, placement opportunities are good and well-managed.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is overall good. College is located in Vidyadhar Nagar, which is a good area. The building has been well-maintained. Classes are fully furnished and spacious. Proper ventilation is provided. It has a well-maintained auditorium also.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for girls' education, and it also works for empowering women.

content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is well-maintained and offers a clean and healthy learning environment. The hostel offers clean and comfortable rooms. It offers good quality food. Many classrooms are well-equipped.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good, and some teachers really put in good effort. The course curriculum is relevant. It trains students for industry. Exams are not that difficult if we are studying regularly and properly. The teaching is very good and awesome. Faculty members are very supportive and very passionate about their teaching.

individual_reviews.title: Biyani Group of Colleges is good for women and their careers.

content.Placements: The college brings many opportunities for students to build themself for their future. Biyani Girls College placements are exceptional. Most importantly, teachers are very supportive and encouraging. The college provides us with good internships for a better future.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of college infrastructure significantly affects students' perception of their well-being. The college offers well-maintained classrooms with tidy chairs and reliable Wi-Fi with internet access. Our college also provides hostels with rules and regulations to ensure student safety.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with Biyani Girls College, as it aims for nurturing young women leaders.

content.Placements: College brings placement opportunities for students on a regular basis with renowned organizations. Also, the college organizes a placement drive every year in which approximately 30-40 companies participate together to recruit skilled and qualified students for vacant job roles.
content.Infrastructure: College is good and has a peaceful environment that brings positivity. It also has various facilities, including a gym area, counseling facilities, canteen facilities, club areas (activity-wise), libraries, smart classrooms, an auditorium, a computer lab, and a Science lab.

admission_overview.college_name: Biyani Girls College Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Fee, Application Process

admission_overview.title: Biyani Girls College Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Currently, Biyani Girls College admissions 2025 is open. The college offers more than ten courses including certificate courses. The selection criteria is based on merit The application process at Biyani Girls College is both an online/offline procedure. The college also offers over 12 certificate courses and the college is affiliated with the University of Rajasthan. However, the UG integrated course is offered by Biyani Girls College. Read on to know more about various Biyani Girls College programmes and their respective admission criteria

eligibility_selection.title: Biyani Girls College Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Biyani Girls College admissions to UG & PG courses are based on merit/entrance exam. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for the BGEC courses 2025:

courses_table.eligibility: Candidates must have passed 10+2 (Science stream) from a recognised board with a minimum 50% aggregate marks.
Graduation in a relevant science discipline from a recognized university with a minimum 50% aggregate marks.

faqs.answer: Biyani Girls College offers excellent quality education and facilities to students. The It's important to understand that B Ed or Bachelor of Education is not an undergraduate degree and to pursue this course one needs to have completed his/her graduation. Moreover, B.Ed. is commonly regarded as the initial formal training for educators, although its main emphasis is on preparing teachers for secondary school education.
faqs.question: Why should I join Biyani Girls College?

faqs.answer: Candidates who are looking for BEd course admission at Biyani Girls College need to meet the last educational qualification set by the college. Aspirants should complete graduation and PG with 50% aggregate from any stream. Students who belong to ST/SC/OBC and other categories should complete the latest education with a 45% aggregate.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BEd at Biyani Girls College?

paragraphs: Biyani Girls College admission process includes registration, selection, national/university/state entrance exam score and admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in Biyani Girls College:
STEP 1: Biyani Girls College Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college. Candidates need to pay an application fee as per the respective courses.
STEP 2: Selection Round

Biyani Girls B.Ed College shortlists candidates based on Merit. Apart from this, candidates also have to meet the educational qualifications set by the college. Students can also check the course-wise eligibility from the table above for the top courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted a seat in the college. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Biyani Girls College?
faqs.answer: To secure a seat at Biyani Girls College, students can check the following steps presented below:Visit the official website and complete the online application process.Ensure eligibility and merit-based selection for UG and PG programs.Sit and appear for entrance exam as per respective courses.Upon being selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.

hostel_campus.college_name: Biyani Girls College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college. Don't take a job, give it.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs of college are very good. The food in canteen is tasty and healthy. The facilities of that college are also great. The canteen is also very hygienic and clean. The staff of this college is also good in their behaviour. They promote daily activities like yoga and sports for the good health of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BIyani Girls College, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is overall good. College is located in Vidyadhar Nagar, which is a good area. The building has been well-maintained. Classes are fully furnished and spacious. Proper ventilation is provided. It has a well-maintained auditorium also.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for girls' education, and it also works for empowering women.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is well-maintained and offers a clean and healthy learning environment. The hostel offers clean and comfortable rooms. It offers good quality food. Many classrooms are well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Biyani Group of Colleges is good for women and their careers.
reviews.review_text: The quality of college infrastructure significantly affects students' perception of their well-being. The college offers well-maintained classrooms with tidy chairs and reliable Wi-Fi with internet access. Our college also provides hostels with rules and regulations to ensure student safety.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with Biyani Girls College, as it aims for nurturing young women leaders.
reviews.review_text: College is good and has a peaceful environment that brings positivity. It also has various facilities, including a gym area, counseling facilities, canteen facilities, club areas (activity-wise), libraries, smart classrooms, an auditorium, a computer lab, and a Science lab.

reviews.review_heading: Biyani Girls College of Nursing: Good faculty and infrastructure, needs better placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities in the college are well-maintained and equipped with all essential amenities to ensure a comfortable stay for students. While the accommodation capacity is adequate, availability may become limited during peak admission periods, so applying early is advisable. The hostels offer a secure environment with round-the-clock surveillance and staff support. Regular cleaning and maintenance are carried out to maintain hygiene and provide a healthy living atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: The inside life of a nursing student.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-structured campus. Academic facilities like a lecture hall with smart boards are available. The hostel is clean, safe, and under warden supervision. There are mess facilities with nutritious meals. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: It has great faculty members and excellent infrastructure. Placement opportunities need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our course facilities are very good. We have Wi-Fi available in the classrooms. The library is also available. Everything is available and good. The hostel facilities are also good. The food in the mess and canteen is also good. We also have excellent sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for girls and our college has good facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college had good facilities and infrastructure. Our classrooms were neat, clean, and well-maintained. Our labs were well-equipped. There were different labs for different departments. There was a huge library in which we could find many books.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Biyani Girls College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with a well-equipped and well-furnished computer lab, physics lab, and chemistry lab. We have three blocks. Those are block a, block b, and block c. There are three computer labs and two libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Good in terms of security of their girls. For a student, it's a second school.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not that good so far and we have to struggle for the availability of many types of equipment. Hostel facilities are pretty well in the college. Good quality in the mess is also excellent. All the students are provided proper food every time. Sports facilities are not much encouraged on this campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to pursue our studies.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge and has different buildings for different streams offered here. There is a temple on the campus. Libraries, computer labs and science labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for pursuing higher studies.
reviews.review_text: It is a huge campus with separate buildings for different streams for various courses provided by the college. Our college also provides hostel facilities for students who are not local residents of Jaipur. Our college has computer labs, physics labs, chemistry labs and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good to opt for graduation.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with well-equipped and well-furnished computer labs, physics labs, chemistry labs and well digital classrooms with ample seating capacity. Moreover, there are 2 separate seminar halls for organising many seminars and competitions in the college only. Our college also provides hostel facilities for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is really good at organising extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The entire college is Wi-Fi enabled. Labs, classrooms and library are digitalised, and there are proper facilities in our college. The hostel, library, classrooms, auditorium and everything are well developed here. Faculty members always try to improve it more.

college_info.college_name: Biyani Girls College Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Biyani Girls College offers courses at the UG and PG level in full-time mode for durations varying from 2 years to 4 years. The College offers admission to the respective courses on the basis of merit and valid scores of accepted entrance exams. Furthermore, the College offers respective courses for the annual course fees varying from INR 30K to INR 85K. Whereas, the annual hostel fees is INR 1.20 Lakh. The application fees is worth INR 1,100. To conclude, being a private College Biyani does offer courses at beyond affordability quotient for students.

Biyani Girls College offers courses such as BSc for 3 years to 4 years with various specialisations. The College offers respective course on the basis of merit with an annual course fees varying from INR 75K to INR 80K. In addition to this, Biyani Girls College offers the respective course with the annual hostel fees of worth INR 1.20 Lakh. Apart from this, candidates are ought to pay INR 1,100 as the application fees.
Yes, Biyani Girls College offers merit-based scholarships. For more details students can check the table presented below:
